body:
For naming consistency, better TW support, and easier Radix migration, we decided to collapse `[data-state]` into multiple attrs like `data-open`, `data-closed`, `data-unchecked`, `data-checked`, and `data-indeterminate`.

**Search keywords**:

**This issue has been closed.** If you have a similar problem but not exactly the same, please open a [new issue](https://github.com/mui/base-ui/issues/new/choose).
Now, if you have additional information related to this issue or things that could help future readers, feel free to leave a comment.

title: [all components] Collapse `data-state` attribute into multiple attrs
